---
title: "master_thesis_site_deepdive"
author: "Savannah K. Miller"
date: "2026-06-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r, working directory and packages}



# data import and database management 
# reading files, reshaping data, and efficient data handling 

#######################################################

library(readxl) # import excel spreadsheets
library(data.table) #quick manipulation of large datasets
library(stringr) # text and string processing 
library(lubridate) # data and time handling 
library(writexl) # exports editted databases into excel files

#######################################################

# General data science workflow 
# Collection of packages for data manipulation and plotting

#######################################################

library(tidyverse)

#######################################################

#Statistical analyses and mixed models 
# Hypothesis testing, summaries, and model fitting 

#######################################################

library(gt) # displaying formatted tables for statistics 
library(rstatix) # statistical tests and assumption checking
library(lmerTest) # p-values and tests for lme4 models 
library(lme4) # linear and generalized mixed-effects models
library(ggeffects) # predicted values and marginal effects 

#######################################################

# Data visualization 
# Plot creation, figure assembly, and publication formatting 

#######################################################

library(patchwork) #combine ggplots into multi-panel figures
library(cowplot) # figure arrangement and plot annotations
library(rcartocolor) # color palettes
library(ggh4x) # advanced ggplot extensions
library(scales) # axis labels, formatting, and scaling 
library(ggridges)

#######################################################
# Spatial data and mapping 
# GIS data handling and map visualization
#######################################################

library(sf) #spatial vector data
library(ggmap) #basemaps and geographic visualization
library(ggspatial) #spatial annotations and map elements
library(leaflet) #interactive web maps

#######################################################

#Tables and report outputs 
# Interactive tables and report presentation 

#######################################################

library(reactable) #interactive tables for reports

#######################################################
# R markdown and document rendering 
# PDF generation and LaTeX support 
#######################################################

library(tinytex) #LaTeX engine for PDF knitting
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r, load the datasheet}

master_thesis = readr::write_csv(sed_thesis, "C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis.csv")

str(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field)
head(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field, 10)
sum(is.na(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field))



```


```{r, site C}


# Filter to just Corte Madera first
cm_data <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(Site == "CorteMadera")

cm_data <- cm_data %>%
  mutate(
    Study.Phase = factor(
      Study.Phase,
      levels = str_sort(unique(Study.Phase), numeric = TRUE)
    ),
    Tran = factor(Tran)
  )


cm_data$Dist <- as.numeric(as.character(cm_data$Dist))
  
cm_data$Date.removed.from.field <- as.Date(cm_data$Date.removed.from.field, format = "%Y-%m-%d")

# Summarize by Transect and Date.removed.from.field instead of by Site
cm_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Date.removed.from.field
  ) %>%
summarise(
  mean_flux = mean(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE),
  se_flux = sd(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(Flux >= 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
  .groups = "drop"
)

ggplot(
  cm_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 3
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = unique(cm_summary$Date.removed.from.field),
    date_labels = "%b %d",
    guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)
  ) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  ) +  
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = "Date Removed from Field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    caption = "Error bars represent ± 1 standard error of the mean"
  )

readr::write_csv(cm_data, "C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis_c.csv")

```


```{r}


cm_raincloud = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Date.removed.from.field,
    fill = Date.removed.from.field
  )
) +  
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Date removed from Field"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
cm_raincloud

cmraincloud_tran = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 125))
cmraincloud_tran
```

```{r}

# Standard caption for plots containing error bars
se_caption <- paste(
  "Points represent transect-level mean flux.",
  "Error bars represent +/- 1 standard error calculated from observations within each transect."
)

# Common theme
flux_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 10,
      hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(t = 8)
    ),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# basic

basic_fluxcm <- ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(x = Flux)
) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 30,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  flux_theme +
  labs(
    title = "Flux Distribution by Transect at Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Count"
  )

basic_fluxcm

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\basic_fluxcm_c.png"),
  plot = basic_fluxcm,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time 

removal_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Date.removed.from.field) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_time_c <- ggplot(
  removal_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 2,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 3),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 3)
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = sort(unique(removal_summary$Date.removed.from.field)),
    date_labels = "%b %d\n%Y",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 30)) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      vjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux Through Time by Transect at Corte Madera",
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Date removed from field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_time_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_time_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_time_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux by Phen_Period 

hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Phen_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_hydro_c <- ggplot(
  hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Phen_Period,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.65)
  ) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 30,
      hjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period and Transect at Corte Madera",
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_hydro_c

meanflux_time_c2 <- ggplot(
  removal_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 2,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = sort(unique(removal_summary$Date.removed.from.field)),
    date_labels = "%b %d\n%Y",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 30)) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 8
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux Through Time by Transect at Corte Madera",
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Date removed from field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_time_c2

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_hydro_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_hydro_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)



# flux by distance 

dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_dist_c <- ggplot(
  dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(dist_summary$Dist_numeric))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 9.5)) +
  flux_theme +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux by Distance and Transect at Corte Madera",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux by z_star

z_summary <- cm_elev %>%
  group_by(Tran, z_star) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_z_c <- ggplot(
  z_summary,
  aes(
    x = mean_flux,
    y = z_star,
    color = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(
      xmin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      xmax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    height = 0.01,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    n.breaks = 8
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = expression("Mean Flux by "*z^"*"*" and Transect at Corte Madera"),
    x = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = expression(z^"*"),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = paste(
      "Points represent mean flux within each transect and z* value.",
      "Horizontal error bars represent +/- 1 standard error."
    )
  )

meanflux_z_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_z_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# raw flux by z star

flux_z_c = ggplot(cm_elev,
       aes(x = z_star,
           y = Flux,
           color = Tran)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

flux_z_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = flux_z_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# raw flux with z as a GAM ( )

flux_z_c_gam = ggplot(cm_elev,
       aes(x = z_star,
           y = Flux)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Tran),
             size = 3,
             alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "gam",
    formula = y ~ s(x),
    color = "black"
  )

flux_z_c_gam

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = flux_z_c_gam,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)


# flux by distance and hydro

dist_hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist, Phen_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

flux_dist_hydro_c <- ggplot(
  dist_hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Phen_Period) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(dist_hydro_summary$Dist_numeric))
  ) +
  flux_theme +
  labs(
    title = "Flux by Distance, Hydrologic Period, and Transect",
    subtitle = "Corte Madera",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

flux_dist_hydro_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_dist_hydro_c.png"),
  plot = flux_dist_hydro_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time by distance 

time_dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Date.removed.from.field) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
 mutate(
    Date_plot = factor(
      format(Date.removed.from.field, "%b %Y"),
      levels = format(sort(unique(Date.removed.from.field)), "%b %Y")
    )
 )

time_dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Dist,
    Date.removed.from.field
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Date_plot = factor(
      format(Date.removed.from.field, "%b %d, %Y"),
      levels = format(
        sort(unique(Date.removed.from.field)),
        "%b %d, %Y"
      )
    )
  )

flux_dist_gradient_c <- ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Date_plot
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 1.2,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 2),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = Date_plot),
    size = 3.5,
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.4,
    position = position_dodge(width = 2)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(
    option = "D",
    end = 0.85
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(
    option = "D",
    end = 0.85
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(time_dist_summary$Dist_numeric)),
    limits = c(-2, 52)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.1, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2),
    fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Flux at Discrete Marsh-Edge Sampling Points",
    subtitle = "Corte Madera; seven sampling distances across 50 m",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Collection date",
    fill = "Collection date",
    caption = se_caption
  )

flux_dist_gradient_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_dist_gradient_c.png"),
  plot = flux_dist_gradient_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# heat map and distance
flux_heatmap_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = Dist,
    fill = mean_flux
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean_flux, 1)),
    color = "white",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Heatmap: Study Phase x Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Date removed from Field",
    y = "Distance from Marsh Edge"
  )
flux_heatmap_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_heatmap_c.png"),
  plot = flux_heatmap_c,
  width = 12,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time by transect 

tran_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Date.removed.from.field) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

flux_tran_time_c = ggplot(
  tran_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,30)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Through Time by Transect at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Date removed from field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect"
  )
flux_tran_time_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_tran_time_c.png"),
  plot = flux_tran_time_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)


# raw flux and distance 

rawflux_dist_c = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)),
    y = Flux
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,120)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Raw Flux vs Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
  )
rawflux_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\rawflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = rawflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# elev and flux

flux_elev_c = ggplot(cm_elev,
   aes(
     x = Elevation_m,
     y = Flux
   )
 ) +
   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
   labs(
     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Corte Madera"),
     x = "Elevation_m",
     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
   )

flux_elev_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_elev_c.png"),
  plot = flux_elev_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# z star and flux

flux_z_c = ggplot(
  cm_elev,
   aes(
     x = z_star,
     y = Flux
   )
 ) +
   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
   labs(
     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Corte Madera"),
     x = "z_star",
     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
   )

flux_z_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_z_c.png"),
  plot = flux_z_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# once veg is cleaned and entered 

# one_site <- one_site %>%
#   mutate(
#     Veg_Structure = Percent_Cover * Avg_Height
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Percent_Cover,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Percent Cover at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Percent Vegetation Cover",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Veg_Structure,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Vegetation Structure at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Vegetation Structure Index (Cover x Height)",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
#   )
```


```{r, corte madera profile}
# Step 1: Create numeric distance, then average elevation across the 3 replicates within each Transect x Distance
elevation_profile <- cm_elev %>%
  mutate(Dist_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Dist))) %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_elevation = mean(Elevation_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_elevation = sd(Elevation_m, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 2: Plot
elevation_profile_c = ggplot(
  elevation_profile,
  aes(
    x = Dist_numeric,
    y = mean_elevation,
    color = Tran,
    fill = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_elevation - se_elevation,
      ymax = mean_elevation + se_elevation
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(elevation_profile$Dist_numeric))) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Marsh Surface Elevation Profile at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Mean elevation \u00b1 SE across 3 replicates per sampling area",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = "Elevation (m)",
    color = "Transect",
    fill = "Transect"
  )
elevation_profile_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\elevation_profile_c.png"),
  plot = elevation_profile_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)




# for z star accounting 

zstar_profile <- cm_elev %>%
  mutate(Dist_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Dist))) %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_zstar = mean(z_star, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_zstar = sd(z_star, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

zstar_profile_c = ggplot(
  zstar_profile,
  aes(
    x = Dist_numeric,
    y = mean_zstar,
    color = Tran,
    fill = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_zstar - se_zstar,
      ymax = mean_zstar + se_zstar
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(zstar_profile$Dist_numeric))) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Relative Tidal Elevation (Z*) Profile at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Mean Z* \u00b1 SE across 3 replicates per sampling area",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = "Z* (Relative Tidal Elevation)",
    color = "Transect",
    fill = "Transect"
  )
zstar_profile_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\zstar_profile_c.png"),
  plot = zstar_profile_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```



```{r, data flags}

flag_cols <- c("Filter_Num", "RB_Num", "Flood_Obsv", "Bio_Obsv", "Drop_Obsv", "OpenBag_Obsv", "Position_Obsv", "DryTime_Obsv", "NegValue_Num")

long_cm <- cm_data %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(flag_cols), 
    names_to = "Flag_Type", 
    values_to = "Flag_Value"
  )

#making a flag database

flagged_cm <- long_cm %>%
  filter(Flag_Value == 1) %>%
  mutate(Flag_Type = factor(Flag_Type, levels = flag_cols))

# consistent color palette across all plots 

flag_colors <-setNames(
  scales::hue_pal()(length(flag_cols)), 
  flag_cols
)

#plot the flags 

flag_summary_cm <- flagged_cm %>%
  group_by(Dist, Flag_Type) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

flag_summary_cm_time <- flagged_cm %>%
  group_by(Date.removed.from.field, Flag_Type) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

cm_total_flags <- ggplot(flag_summary_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = n, fill = Flag_Type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(
    title = "Flag Occurrences by Distance", 
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)", 
    y = "Count", 
    fill = "Flage Type"
  )

cm_total_flags

cm_total_flags_time <- ggplot(flag_summary_cm_time, aes(x = Date.removed.from.field, y = n, fill = Flag_Type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(
    title = "Flag Occurrences by Time", 
    x = "Study.Phase", 
    y = "Count", 
    fill = "Flage Type"
  )

cm_total_flags_time

```

```{r}
#############################################################
# PREPARE ELEVATION AND QC FLAG DATA
#############################################################

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# Variables identifying one sediment observation
join_keys <- c(
  "Site",
  "Tran",
  "Dist",
  "Replicate"
)

# Add elevation to the original wide sediment dataset.
# Only z_star is brought over, preventing unwanted .x/.y columns.
#cm_z_flux <- cm_data |>
  #left_join(
    #cm_elev |>
      #select(
     #   Site,
      #  Tran,
      #  Dist,
    #    Replicate,
    #    z_star
   #   ),
 #   by = join_keys,
  #  relationship = "many-to-one"
#  )


# Original QC flag columns
flag_cols <- c(
  "Filter_Num",
  "RB_Num",
  "Flood_Obsv",
  "Bio_Obsv",
  "Drop_Obsv",
  "OpenBag_Obsv",
  "Position_Obsv",
  "DryTime_Obsv",
  "NegValue_Num"
)


# Reader-friendly names
flag_labels <- c(
  "Filter_Num"    = "Filter Issues",
  "RB_Num"        = "Rubber Band Issues",
  "Flood_Obsv"    = "Flood/Ponding",
  "Bio_Obsv"      = "Biological Matter",
  "Drop_Obsv"     = "Recorded Drop in Field/Lab",
  "OpenBag_Obsv"  = "Open Ziploc Bag Observed",
  "Position_Obsv" = "Position Changed",
  "DryTime_Obsv"  = "Multiple Drying Times Needed",
  "NegValue_Num"  = "Negative Flux Values Calculated"
)


# Field issues use greens and blues.
# Laboratory and processing issues use artificial warm,
# magenta, and neutral colors.
flag_colors <- c(
  # Likely Degrading the Mass
  "Filter Issues"                   = "#1B4F72",
  "Flood/Ponding"                   = "#2E86AB",
  "Recorded Drop in Field/Lab"      = "#5DADE2",
  "Negative Flux Values Calculated" = "#48C9B0", 

  # Likely inflating the mass
  "Rubber Band Issues"              = "#7B241c",
  "Biological Matter"               = "#C0392B",
  "Open Ziploc Bag Observed"        = "#E67E22",
  "Multiple Drying Times Needed"    = "#CB4335",
  

 # Likely neutral
 "Position Changed"                = "#7F8C8D"
  ) 

flag_levels <- names(flag_colors)


# Convert the wide flag columns to long format
cm_z_flux_long <- cm_elev |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(flag_cols),
    names_to = "Flag_Code",
    values_to = "Flag_Value"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Flag_Type = recode(
      Flag_Code,
      !!!flag_labels
    ),
    Flag_Type = factor(
      Flag_Type,
      levels = flag_levels
    ),
    Date.removed.from.field = as_date(
      Date.removed.from.field
    )
  )


# Keep only recorded flags
flagged_cm <- cm_z_flux_long |>
  filter(Flag_Value == 1)


#############################################################
# SUMMARY TABLES USED BY THE PLOTS
#############################################################

# Flags by distance
flag_summary_distance <- flagged_cm |>
  count(
    Dist,
    Flag_Type,
    name = "n"
  )


# Flags by sampling date
flag_summary_time <- flagged_cm |>
  count(
    Date.removed.from.field,
    Flag_Type,
    name = "n"
  )


# Flags by transect and phenological period
flag_counts_period <- flagged_cm |>
  count(
    Tran,
    Phen_Period,
    Flag_Type,
    name = "n"
  )


# Flags by transect and sampling date
flag_counts_day <- flagged_cm |>
  count(
    Tran,
    Date.removed.from.field,
    Flag_Type,
    name = "n"
  )


# Flag proportions within each transect and sampling date
flag_props_day <- flagged_cm |>
  count(
    Tran,
    Date.removed.from.field,
    Flag_Type,
    name = "n"
  ) |>
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Date.removed.from.field
  ) |>
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n)
  ) |>
  ungroup()


```



```{r, claude suggested flag visualizations}

#############################################################
# QC FLAG VISUALIZATIONS
#############################################################

# Shared theme for all QC plots
flag_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


#############################################################
# 1. FLAG OCCURRENCES BY DISTANCE
#############################################################

cm_total_flags <- ggplot(
  flag_summary_distance,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = n,
    fill = Flag_Type
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    width = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  labs(
    title = "QC Flag Occurrences by Distance",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = "Number of Flag Occurrences",
    fill = "Flag Type"
  )

cm_total_flags


#############################################################
# 2. FLAG OCCURRENCES THROUGH TIME
#############################################################

cm_total_flags_time <- ggplot(
  flag_summary_time,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = n,
    fill = Flag_Type
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    width = 20
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "QC Flag Occurrences Through Time",
    x = "Date Removed from Field",
    y = "Number of Flag Occurrences",
    fill = "Flag Type"
  )

cm_total_flags_time


#############################################################
# 3. SMALL MULTIPLES:
#    FLAG TYPE BY PHENOLOGICAL PERIOD AND TRANSECT
#############################################################

cm_flags_period_transect <- ggplot(
  flag_counts_period,
  aes(
    x = Flag_Type,
    y = n,
    fill = Flag_Type
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    Phen_Period ~ Tran,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 7
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "QC Flag Frequency by Phenological Period and Transect",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of Flag Occurrences"
  )

cm_flags_period_transect


#############################################################
# 4. FLAG TYPE BY SAMPLING DAY AND TRANSECT
#
# Faceting by every date can become very large.
#############################################################

cm_flags_day_transect <- ggplot(
  flag_counts_day,
  aes(
    x = Flag_Type,
    y = n,
    fill = Flag_Type
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    Date.removed.from.field ~ Tran,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 6
    ),
    strip.text.y = element_text(
      size = 7,
      angle = 0
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "QC Flag Frequency by Sampling Day and Transect",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of Flag Occurrences"
  )

cm_flags_day_transect


#############################################################
# 5. FLUX DISTRIBUTION BY FLAG TYPE
#
# An observation with multiple flags appears once for each
# recorded flag. This is intentional in the long dataset.
#############################################################

cm_flux_by_flag <- ggplot(
  flagged_cm,
  aes(
    x = Flag_Type,
    y = Flux,
    fill = Flag_Type
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width = 0.65,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.3,
    size = 1
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ Tran,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Flux Distribution by QC Flag Type",
    subtitle = "Panels represent individual transects",
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

cm_flux_by_flag


#############################################################
# 6. ELEVATION VS DISTANCE, WITH FLAGGED OBSERVATIONS
#
# Because the long table has one row per flag variable,
# use flagged_cm so only recorded flags are displayed.
#############################################################

cm_flags_z_distance <- ggplot(
  flagged_cm,
  aes(
    x = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)),
    y = z_star,
    color = Flag_Type
  )
) +
  geom_point(
    size = 2.3,
    alpha = 0.85,
    position = position_jitter(
      width = 0.15,
      height = 0
    )
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ Tran
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  labs(
    title = "Elevation and Distance of Flagged Observations",
    subtitle = "Only observations with recorded QC flags are shown",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression("Elevation (" * z^"*" * ")"),
    color = "Flag Type"
  )

cm_flags_z_distance


#############################################################
# 7. TIMELINE OF FLAG COUNTS BY TRANSECT
#
# Tile fill represents the total number of recorded flags,
# avoiding overlap when several flags occur on one date.
#############################################################

flag_totals_day <- flagged_cm |>
  count(
    Tran,
    Date.removed.from.field,
    name = "total_flags"
  )

cm_flag_timeline <- ggplot(
  flag_totals_day,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = Tran,
    fill = total_flags
  )
) +
  geom_tile(
    color = "white",
    height = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "grey95",
    high = "#4D4D4D"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    ),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total QC Flags Through Time by Transect",
    x = "Date Removed from Field",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Total Flags"
  )

cm_flag_timeline


#############################################################
# 8. FLAG COMPOSITION BY DATE AND TRANSECT
#
# A stacked bar is more appropriate than overlapping tiles
# for showing proportions of several flag types.
#############################################################

cm_flag_proportions <- ggplot(
  flag_props_day,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = prop,
    fill = Flag_Type
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    width = 20
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ Tran,
    ncol = 1
  ) +
  flag_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Composition of QC Flags by Date and Transect",
    x = "Date Removed from Field",
    y = "Percentage of Recorded Flags",
    fill = "Flag Type"
  )

cm_flag_proportions


#############################################################
# 9. FLAG CO-OCCURRENCE MATRIX
#
# This section uses the original wide cm_z_flux dataset.
#############################################################

flag_matrix <- cm_elev |>
  select(
    all_of(flag_cols)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(
      everything(),
      ~ as.integer(replace_na(.x, 0) == 1)
    )
  ) |>
  as.matrix()

co_occurrence <- t(flag_matrix) %*% flag_matrix

co_occurrence_df <- as.data.frame(co_occurrence) |>
  rownames_to_column("Flag_Code_1") |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Flag_Code_1,
    names_to = "Flag_Code_2",
    values_to = "n"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Flag_1 = recode(
      Flag_Code_1,
      !!!flag_labels
    ),
    Flag_2 = recode(
      Flag_Code_2,
      !!!flag_labels
    ),
    Flag_1 = factor(
      Flag_1,
      levels = flag_levels
    ),
    Flag_2 = factor(
      Flag_2,
      levels = flag_levels
    )
  )

cm_flag_cooccurrence <- ggplot(
  co_occurrence_df,
  aes(
    x = Flag_1,
    y = Flag_2,
    fill = n
  )
) +
  geom_tile(
    color = "white"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "grey95",
    high = "#7570B3"
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  flag_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "QC Flag Co-occurrence Matrix",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Co-occurrences"
  )

cm_flag_cooccurrence


#############################################################
# 10. OPTIONAL UPSET-STYLE CO-OCCURRENCE PLOT
#############################################################

# Install once if needed:
 install.packages("ggupset")

 library(ggupset)

 upset_data <- cm_elev|>
   mutate(
     flags_present = pmap(
      pick(all_of(flag_cols)),
      function(...) {
         values <- c(...)
         active_codes <- flag_cols[
          replace_na(values, 0) == 1
         ]

        unname(flag_labels[active_codes])
       }
     )
   ) |>
   filter(lengths(flags_present) > 0)

 cm_flag_upset <- ggplot(
   upset_data,
   aes(x = flags_present)
 ) +
   geom_bar(fill = "#7570B3") +
   scale_x_upset(
     order_by = "freq"
   ) +
   flag_theme +
   labs(
     title = "QC Flag Co-occurrence",
     x = NULL,
     y = "Number of Observations"
   )

 cm_flag_upset

```

 
```{r}

# Determine the complete observed flux range
flux_range <- range(
  cm_elev$Flux,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# Add padding so the minimum and maximum points are not clipped
flux_padding <- diff(flux_range) * 0.05

if (flux_padding == 0) {
  flux_padding <- 1
}

flux_limits <- c(
  flux_range[1] - flux_padding,
  flux_range[2] + flux_padding
)

# Candidate axis labels spanning negative, low, and high flux values
candidate_flux_breaks <- c(
  -50, -20, -10, -5, -2, -1,
  0,
  1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 30, 50, 100
)

flux_breaks <- candidate_flux_breaks[
  candidate_flux_breaks >= flux_limits[1] &
    candidate_flux_breaks <= flux_limits[2]
]

# Shared y-axis used in both figures
shared_flux_scale <- scale_y_continuous(
  trans = scales::pseudo_log_trans(
    sigma = 1,
    base = 10
  ),
  breaks = flux_breaks,
  limits = flux_limits,
  expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.04))
)
```


```{r}

flux_flags_distance <- ggplot() +

  # Complete dataset shown underneath
  geom_point(
    data = cm_elev,
    aes(
      x = Dist_numeric,
      y = Flux
    ),
    color = "grey55",
    shape = 16,
    alpha = 0.4,
    size = 2.1,
    position = position_jitter(
      width = 0.12,
      height = 0
    )
  ) +

  # Flagged observations shown on top
  geom_point(
    data = flagged_cm,
    aes(
      x = Dist_numeric,
      y = Flux,
      color = Flag_Type,
      shape = Flag_Type
    ),
    alpha = 0.95,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 1.1,
    position = position_jitter(
      width = 0.12,
      height = 0
    )
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = flag_colors,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    name = "QC Flag"
  ) +

  scale_shape_manual(
    values = flag_shapes,
    limits = flag_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    name = "QC Flag"
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(cm_z_flux$Dist_numeric)),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.04, 0.04))
  ) +

  shared_flux_scale +

  facet_wrap(
    ~ Tran,
    ncol = 1
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +

  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Sediment Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge",
    subtitle = paste(
      "Pseudo-logarithmic y-axis preserves low, zero,",
      "negative, and high flux observations"
    ),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

flux_flags_distance

```
